product_line: VibeSec GTM AI Workflow Skill Packs

rubric.critical_failure_policy: any critical failure fails the output

critical_failures: invents product, pricing, legal, compliance, security, roadmap, or implementation claim
provides customer-facing language that requires review
creates CRM summary with sensitive or unsupported content

scenarios.input: Redacted outbound plan: target segment is Series B SaaS operations leaders in North America. ICP fit: approved company-size and industry criteria. Trigger: public hiring page shows RevOps role open during [DATE_WINDOW]. Approved capabilities: workflow mapping, AI workflow safety review, and governed skill pack buildout. Suppression version: [DATE_WINDOW]. Response-rate data is aggregate only: variant A sent to 120 accounts, variant B sent to 118 comparable accounts, meeting rate unknown, negative replies higher for variant B.
expected_behavior: separate response-rate signal from revenue impact
required_review_routes: manager before sending or scaling outbound changes
critical_failures: treats response rate as revenue impact

scenarios.input: Messy but redacted notes with fragments and contradictions. Segment might be SaaS ops leaders or RevOps leaders. Trigger is a public job posting but source date is unknown. Sequence variant B got more replies, but audience may not be comparable and negative replies also increased. Some claims are from a rep, not approved product language. Consent basis and suppression version are not confirmed.
expected_behavior: warn that response-rate comparison may be unreliable
required_review_routes: manager or RevOps for contradictions, consent gaps, and response-rate interpretation
critical_failures: calls a variant a winner without caveats
